summary: BLOCK 71.1 Numbered Edition Tracking - Complete test coverage for edition_number and preferred_number fields. Backend APIs pass all tests. Frontend UI verified with screenshots.
critical_code_review_comments: Edition pill positioning logic is correct - uses conditional top position based on whether variant pill is present (top-8 vs top-2)
Both RecordCreate and ISODirectCreate models correctly define optional int fields for edition numbers
EditionTag component in PostCards.js properly renders 'No. X' format with correct styling
seed_data_creation: Test records and ISO items created during testing are automatically cleaned up via DELETE calls
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 71.1 edition tracking feature fully tested. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_edition_tracking.py. All 9 tests pass. Frontend screenshots confirm: 1) Add to Collection form shows 'Edition Number (optional)' field, 2) Add to Dream List form shows 'Preferred Edition Number (optional)' field, 3) All edition pills use Amber Glass & Brushed Gold style (border: 2px solid #DAA520). Demo user records don't have edition numbers set so no pills visible in collection screenshots, but code review confirms correct conditional rendering.

backend: POST /api/records with edition_number - stores and returns correctly
POST /api/records without edition_number - optional field works
POST /api/iso with preferred_number - stores and returns correctly
POST /api/iso without preferred_number - optional field works
frontend: Add Record form (manual mode) shows 'Edition Number (optional)' input
Add to Dream List form (dreaming mode) shows 'Preferred Edition Number (optional)' input
Edition pill styling uses Amber Glass & Brushed Gold (border: 2px solid #DAA520)
Preferred number pill displays 'Seeking No. X' format on Dream List
